title: Returns and refund policy
content: Products may be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided they are in like-new condition with original packaging. To process a return, we need the order number and a brief reason for the return so we can route it correctly (change of mind, defect, or wrong item). Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days of receiving the returned item. Return shipping is free for defective items and customer-paid for change-of-mind returns.
